description_long: This is a cylindrical, vertically-oriented package of Faragello Chicken Burger Jumbo, wrapped in a glossy, dark brown and beige plastic bag. The top of the package is twisted and gathered, likely sealed to maintain freshness, and the front features a prominent red and white Faragello logo above an appetizing image of a chicken burger with lettuce and tomato. The sides and back of the package display additional product information, including nutritional labeling, preparation instructions, and branding details. The packaging is smooth and slightly reflective, with a clear distinction between the dark brown upper section and the lighter beige lower section. The object appears lightweight and is designed for easy handling, suitable for placement on store shelves or in home kitchens. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with clear branding and product imagery.
description: A cylindrical, glossy plastic package of Faragello Chicken Burger Jumbo with a twisted top, featuring a red and white logo and a chicken burger image on the front.
description_view_0: The back-left side of the package, showing partial product information and the transition between dark brown and beige colors.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the Faragello logo and a large image of a chicken burger, with clear branding and product name.
description_view_2: The front-right side, revealing more of the product image and some nutritional and branding details.
description_view_3: The back view, showing detailed nutritional labeling, preparation instructions, and the Faragello logo at the top.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white Faragello logo is visible on the front and back of the package, rectangular with rounded edges and a stylized 'F' above the brand name.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package shows an image of a chicken burger and the text 'Chicken Burger Jumbo', indicating a chicken flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the package, including a nutrition facts panel and preparation instructions.
